title: dactylorhiza olocheilos
intro: Dactylorhiza olocheilos, also known as the spotted orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza olocheilos include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which can help to reduce swelling, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system. Dactylorhiza olocheilos can be prepared into various herbal products, including dried roots, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications.
